title: S2: knowledge check joins the verify chain as a chain-failing suite
action: Per D22/D34 (chain-failing, graduated by D4's error/warning split — NEVER --strict here per the integration review's not-recommended list): add a knowledge-check entry to EXTRA_SUITES in scripts/run_verify.mjs. Entries are spawned as [process.execPath, script, ...args] (run_verify.mjs:199), so the entry is [".bee/bin/bee.mjs", "knowledge", "check"] — plain check: OKF errors fail the chain (exit 1), profile warnings do not (exit 0, D13). Add the same suite to MANDATORY_SUITES in scripts/test_verify_manifest.mjs (rename/drop protection, :46) and bump SUITE_FLOOR_COUNT if it is an exact count. Extend test_verify_manifest expectations as needed — additive only, never weaken. RED-first where honest: assert the manifest pin exists before adding it. Verify: full chain green (now 62 suites incl. the new entry).

truths: node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0 and its output lists the knowledge check suite as PASS

a doctored fixture proof exists in the trace: with a temporary OKF-error file under docs/knowledge/, run_verify (or the suite entry alone) exits non-zero — then the fixture is removed (never committed)
MANDATORY_SUITES pins the new entry so silently dropping it later fails test_verify_manifest
prohibitions: no --strict in the chain entry (D8-graduation: warnings stay warnings until F2)
never weaken an existing manifest assertion
the doctored fixture never lands in the commit

trace.outcome: knowledge check joins verify chain as chain-failing suite, pinned in mandatory manifest; red-side fixture proof captured and removed
